title: MonsterMQ Edge
description: Schema for the monster-mq-edge config.yaml. Mirrors internal/config/config.go.

NodeId.description: Identifier for this broker instance, recorded with sessions and metrics.

MaxMessageSize.description: Maximum MQTT packet size in bytes.

DefaultStoreType.description: Backend used by every store unless overridden below.

SessionStoreType.description: Override for the session/subscription store; falls back to DefaultStoreType. MEMORY uses an in-memory SQLite database.

RetainedStoreType.description: Override for the retained-message store; falls back to DefaultStoreType. MEMORY = mochi-mqtt's in-memory map only, no DB persistence and no startup load.

ConfigStoreType.description: Override for the device-config store; falls back to DefaultStoreType.

QueueStoreType.description: Override for the queued-message store; falls back to DefaultStoreType. MEMORY uses an in-memory SQLite database and does not survive restart.

Path.description: Filesystem path to the SQLite database file.

Enabled.description: When false, all clients are accepted (anonymous).

AnonymousEnabled.description: When true, missing credentials are allowed even with UserManagement.Enabled=true.

StoreType.description: Where metrics history is stored. Omit to use DefaultStoreType. MEMORY avoids flash writes; NONE disables history storage while keeping live metrics.

RetentionHours.description: Hours of metrics to retain. 0 disables retention pruning.

MaxHistoryRows.description: Maximum in-memory metric rows retained when StoreType=MEMORY. 0 uses the built-in default.

MqttSyslogEnabled.description: Forward log records to a $SYS/log topic.

RingBufferSize.description: In-memory log ring buffer size, surfaced via GraphQL logTail.

Features.description: Subsystem feature toggles. Mirrors the Features map in the main monster-mq broker.

MqttClient.description: Enable the outbound MQTT bridge client manager.

WinCCUa.description: Enable the WinCC Unified bridge (GraphQL or Open Pipe transports).

WinCCOa.description: Enable the WinCC Open Architecture bridge (GraphQL/WebSocket transport).

QueuedMessagesEnabled.description: true: store messages for offline persistent (clean=false) sessions in the QueueStore so they survive broker restart. false: rely on mochi-mqtt's in-memory inflight buffer (lost on restart).

Address.description: Bind address. Defaults to 0.0.0.0 (IPv4). Use '::' for IPv6 dual-stack.

KeyStorePassword.description: Password for the keystore (TLS listeners only).
